---
title: "Cosas"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 

![](/outputs/figures/00_combined_real_data.png)

![](outputs/figures/03_emotions_by_bloc.png){fig-align="center"}

![](outputs/figures/05_network_echo_chambers.png){fig-align="center"}

![](outputs/figures/04_anti_communism_rate.png){fig-align="center"}

![](outputs/figures/07_model_roc_pr_calibration_sim.png){fig-align="center"}

añadir tabla

ml_results

"outputs/tables/openai_bloc_per_class_metrics.csv"

openai_evaluation_metrics.csv
